description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-04-08T21:05:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 9 April 2026:
Park Island Transport Company Limited
‘Ma Wan – Central’ Route:
- Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

‘Ma Wan – Tsuen Wan’ Route:
- Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled
- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled.
2026-04-08T21:05:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年4月9日作出臨時調整：
珀麗灣客運有限公司
「馬灣-中環」航線：
-馬灣至中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴士服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
-中環至馬灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴士服務(路線NR338S)代替營運

「馬灣-荃灣」航線：
-馬灣至荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次
-荃灣至馬灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次。

2026-04-09T20:36:00.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 10 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited ‘Ma Wan – Central’ Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) ‘Ma Wan – Tsuen Wan’ Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
2026-04-09T20:36:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年4月10日作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「馬灣-中環」航線： -馬灣至中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴士服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環至馬灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴士服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「馬灣-荃灣」航線： -馬灣至荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣至馬灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次
